purpose: Top-down arrangement of beauty products with complementary props. Editorial flat lay.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial top-down flat lay photography of {product_collection} arranged on {surface_descriptor}, complementary props (fresh flowers, ribbon, ceramic dish), soft natural daylight from above, hyper-realistic product and surface detail, shot from directly overhead at 90 degrees on 35mm at f/5.6, premium editorial flat lay aesthetic, no text, no watermark, no hands {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: B03. Saudi adaptation guidance: Props can include subtle traditional elements (Saudi pottery dish, traditional incense holder) for cultural anchoring. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
